nasb.text: They said, “We see plainly that the Lord has been with you; so we said, ‘Let there now be an oath between us, even between you and us, and let us make a covenant with you,

esv.text: They said, “We see plainly that the Lord has been with you. So we said, let there be a sworn pact between us, between you and us, and let us make a covenant with you,

cnv.text: 他們回答：“我們實在看見耶和華與你同在，因此我們想：‘不如我們雙方起誓。’讓我們與你立約吧；

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“我们清楚知道耶和华与你同在，我们双方应该订立誓约。

csbs.text: 他们说：“我们清楚地看见耶和华与你同在，就想我们之间应该有一个誓约，就在你和我们之间。让我们与你立约：
